error.message: Live backend is not available for this static deployment.

required_next: P59 Query Observation Contract v0; deploy the wrapper only through operator-gated work and record hosted evidence before configuring a backend URL.

notes: The current stdlib HTTP API is used for local demo/public-alpha wrapper checks.
It is not the future /api/v1 public handoff contract and is not a stable production API.
This is a route-reservation and handoff contract only.
GitHub Pages remains a static-only publication target.
No backend hosting, live source probe, auth, account, CORS, rate-limit, provider deployment, or production API guarantee is added.
Live Probe Gateway Contract v0 now defines disabled-by-default probe policy, but /api/v1/live-probe remains blocked until later explicit implementation approval.
Public Search API Contract v0 now has Local Public Search Runtime v0 route handlers for local/prototype /search and /api/v1/search without making hosted search live or enabling live probes.
Public Search Static Handoff v0 adds static /search.html and old-client handoff outputs that point to local runtime instructions while keeping hosted backend status unavailable.
Public Search Result Card Contract v0 defines the result-card output used by the local runtime without adding live backend behavior.
Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 treats /api/v1 as a future optional projection alongside static data, lite/text/files, snapshots, relay, CLI, and native-client plans.

Public Search Safety / Abuse Guard v0 now constrains local_index_only safety, abuse, privacy, and operator-control requirements; the live backend remains future and rate-limit middleware remains unimplemented.

Public Search Production Contract v0 reserves top-level /healthz and /status plus /api/v1/capabilities and /api/v1/absence/{need_id} for the future hosted wrapper without implementing or hosting them.

Hosted Public Search Wrapper v0 adds a local/prototype deployable wrapper script and local rehearsal check for local_index_only only. It does not deploy a backend, verify hosted deployment, enable live probes, add rate-limit middleware, or change GitHub Pages static-only status.

Static Site Search Integration v0 adds generated no-JS static search surfaces, search_config.json, and public_index_summary.json while keeping hosted backend status unconfigured and GitHub Pages static-only.

Public Search Safety Evidence v0 records local safe-query, blocked-request, limit/status, static handoff, public index, hosted-wrapper, privacy/redaction, and operator-gated rate-limit evidence without hosted deployment or live probes.
Hosted Public Search Rehearsal v0 starts the wrapper on localhost and proves route/safety compatibility without deployment, edge rate limits, live probes, or hosted URL evidence.
